response.original_title: Drawing the Line: A Philippine Animation Documentary
response.overview: Behind every beloved animated film, every unforgettable character, every frame that made us feel something—there is a Filipino artist who drew the line. Drawing the Line celebrates the heart of Philippine animation while gently reminding its next generation that passion may bring you here, but your fundamentals will take you further. A passion project and student capstone output.
response.tagline: Back to basics, Forward to the industry!
response.title: Drawing the Line: A Philippine Animation Documentary
